examples: He felt a sudden inexpressible loneliness.
Many deaf people have feelings of isolation and loneliness.
I have so many friends, but deep down, underneath, I have a fear of loneliness.
In his 200 interviews, Belk found that the most obsessive collectors had one overwhelming trait in common: loneliness.
Primarily that would be the weather but we also think loneliness and isolation contributes to that.
